question: Define a class `Vehicle` with `public` member `brand` (string), `protected` member `model` (string), and `private` member `year` (int). Demonstrate how to access and modify these members: directly for `brand`, through a derived class method for `model`, and through a public getter/setter for `year` within the `Vehicle` class itself.

test_cases.expected:
--- Initial State ---
--- Car Details ---
  Brand: Mercedes-Benz
  Model: C-Class
  Year: 2022
-------------------

--- After modifying brand directly ---
Brand: BMW
Year: 2022

--- After modifying model via derived class ---
Model: 3 Series

--- After modifying year via setter ---
New Year (via getter): 2024

--- Final State (valid data) ---
--- Car Details ---
  Brand: BMW
  Model: 3 Series
  Year: 2024
-------------------

--- Demonstrating Input Validation ---
Warning: Invalid year (1800) provided. Year not updated.
Warning: Invalid year (2030) provided. Year not updated.
Current Year after invalid attempts: 2024
Warning: Model cannot be empty. Model not updated.
Model: 3 Series

--- State after Validation Attempts ---
--- Car Details ---
  Brand: BMW
  Model: 3 Series
  Year: 2024
-------------------
